landing.title.description: Browser title on the landing page

landing.description.message: First-hand course reviews and advice for WashU CS, Math, and Economics students.

landing.tagline.message: A community-maintained doc for WashU course reviews. Help each other learn real stuff and keep your GPA alive.

landing.how.read.body.message: Pick CS / Math / Econ from the top nav, then find your course in the left sidebar. Reviews are written by past students — professors, exams, and grading change every semester, so double-check anything load-bearing.

landing.how.write.body.message: Thanks for contributing! Fork the GitHub repo and open a Pull Request: add a new <CourseReview> block to an existing course page, or create a new page. Keep objective facts in 'content', subjective takes in 'evaluation'.

landing.how.i18n.body.message: Chinese is the source of truth. English translations are generated automatically by Sourcery on new PRs. Switch language from the top-right.
